title: sedum alpestre
intro: Sedum alpestre, also known as mountain stonecrop, is a species of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family, characterized by its thick, fleshy leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Sedum alpestre include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Sedum alpestre can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
